actionUnits.condition: FireBasedAudioManager (MonoBehaviour id 112451392, guid 77f9a59041a2de446bf7704b5c31f103) is attached to Stressed_Guy_No with fireLimit=10 and timeInterval=25. In Awake it assigns audioSource via GetComponent<AudioSource>() and sets shouldPlay=true. With BoxCollider present, allow time to progress for > timeInterval so Update() triggers audioSource.Play(). After waiting, invoke a no-arg public method on the SteamAudioSource to exercise component access.
